training.title: Training Log + AI Coach
training.subtitle: 训练日志 + AI教练
training.noSuggestion: Save training data to get AI coaching suggestions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: 设置
settings.statusNotConfigured: API key is not configured. The AI Coach feature requires an OpenAI API key.
settings.securityNote: Your key is encrypted via macOS Keychain and stored locally. It is never sent anywhere except to the OpenAI API.
settings.howToGetKey: How to get an API key

welcome.title: Welcome to FitHelper
welcome.subtitle: A lightweight health utility — quick tools to help you live healthier.

features.title: What's Inside
features.converter: Convert between mph and min/km instantly.
features.daily: Track daily intake with smart suggestions.
features.training: Log workouts and get AI coaching.

apiKey.title: Set up AI Coach (optional)
apiKey.description: The AI Coach analyzes your training and gives personalized advice. It requires an OpenAI API key.
apiKey.step2: Sign up or log in to your OpenAI account
apiKey.step3: Click "Create new secret key", give it a name, copy it

done.title: You're all set!
done.keyConfigured: AI Coach is ready to go.
done.keySkipped: You can set up the AI Coach later in Settings.

tour.step1: Pace Converter — quickly convert running pace between mph and min/km.
tour.step2: Calorie Library — browse and manage your food calorie database.
tour.step3: Daily Tracker — set a calorie target and log your meals.
tour.step4: Training Log + AI Coach — record workouts and get AI-powered advice.
tour.step5: Settings — configure your OpenAI API key anytime.
tour.step6: Switch between English and Chinese with one click.

hint.tool1: Type a speed or pace value — conversion happens automatically. Use the swap button to change direction.
hint.tool2: This is your personal food database. The app comes with preset items — feel free to add, edit, or delete any of them.
hint.tool3: Set today's calorie target, add food items, and toggle them between planned and eaten. Drag to reorder.
hint.tool4: Write your training notes in any format. When you save, the AI Coach will analyze your progress.
hint.noApiKey: Set up your API key in Settings to enable AI Coach.
